Hub Home > Personal Productivity > Learning Accelerator for New Skills

Learning Accelerator for New Skills

Create a compressed learning plan for any business skill — from financial modeling to public speaking to a new software tool. Maps the 20% of knowledge that delivers 80% of results, with daily practice tasks and progress checkpoints.

Beginner STEP BY STEP Time-saving
Pro tip

Be specific about WHY you need this skill and by WHEN. "Learn Excel" is vague. "Be able to build a P&L model in Excel for my board meeting in 3 weeks" gives you a focused, achievable plan.

learning skill development self-improvement education pareto 80-20 upskilling

How to use this prompt

  1. Pick your AI model. Choose the tab for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot — each variant is tuned for that model.
  2. Copy the full prompt. Click Copy Full Prompt to copy the text to your clipboard.
  3. Paste into your AI tool. Open your chosen model and paste the prompt into a new chat.
  4. Replace the [placeholders]. Swap any bracketed fields for your company name, audience, product or tone.
  5. Run and refine. Review the output. If anything is off, ask the AI to tighten tone, length or format.

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a learning coach who specializes in rapid skill acquisition for busy professionals.

<learning_goal>
Skill to learn: [WHAT — be specific]
Why I need it: [BUSINESS REASON — e.g., "need to...
You are a learning coach who specializes in rapid skill acquisition for busy professionals.

<learning_goal>
Skill to learn: [WHAT — be specific]
Why I need it: [BUSINESS REASON — e.g., "need to...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a learning coach who specializes in rapid skill acquisition for busy professionals.

<learning_goal>
Skill to learn: [WHAT — be specific]
Why I need it: [BUSINESS REASON — e.g., "need to build financial models for investor meetings"]
Deadline: [WHEN I need to be competent]
Current level: [complete beginner / know the basics / intermediate]
Time I can dedicate: [hours per day/week]
Learning style: [reading / video / hands-on practice / mix]
</learning_goal>

Build my accelerated learning plan:

1. **The 80/20 map** — what are the 20% of concepts and skills that deliver 80% of practical value for my specific use case? List them in learning order.

2. **What to skip** — common topics that courses teach but I do NOT need for my goal. This saves me the most time.

3. **Daily learning plan** — structured schedule with:
   - Concept to learn (with best free resource: specific video, article, or tutorial)
   - Practice exercise (hands-on, not just reading)
   - Time estimate
   - Checkpoint: how to verify I understood it

4. **Project milestone** — a real deliverable I can build by the deadline that proves competence. Break it into weekly sub-goals.

5. **Sticking points** — the 3 places where people most commonly get stuck learning this skill, with specific strategies to push through each one.

6. **Resources ranked** — top 5 learning resources for my level, ranked by efficiency (learning per hour invested), not comprehensiveness.
Notes: Claude builds focused, realistic learning plans. The "what to skip" section is often the most valuable — it prevents you from going down rabbit holes that courses love but your deadline does not allow.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a learning coach for busy professionals. Build me an accelerated plan to learn a new skill.

Skill: [WHAT]
Why: [BUSINESS...

Why: [BUSINESS...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a learning coach for busy professionals. Build me an accelerated plan to learn a new skill.

Skill: [WHAT]
Why: [BUSINESS REASON]
Deadline: [WHEN]
Current level: [beginner / basics / intermediate]
Time available: [hours per day/week]
Learning style: [reading / video / hands-on / mix]

Create:
1. 80/20 map — the vital 20% of knowledge for my use case, in order
2. What to skip — topics courses cover that I do not need
3. Daily learning plan with resources, exercises, time estimates, checkpoints
4. Project milestone — a real deliverable by my deadline, broken into weekly goals
5. Top 3 sticking points and how to push through
6. Top 5 resources ranked by learning efficiency
Notes: ChatGPT can act as a practice partner — after each lesson, quiz yourself by explaining the concept back. "Test me on what I just learned" is a powerful retention technique.

**Why:** [REASON]
**Deadline:**...

**Deadline:**...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Build a fast learning plan for a new skill.

**Skill:** [WHAT]
**Why:** [REASON]
**Deadline:** [WHEN]
**Level:** [beginner / basics / intermediate]
**Time:** [hours per day/week]
**Style:** [reading / video / hands-on / mix]

Research the best current learning resources for this skill, then create:
1. 80/20 map of essential knowledge
2. What to skip
3. Daily plan with specific resource links, exercises, and checkpoints
4. Project milestone with weekly sub-goals
5. Common sticking points and solutions
6. Top 5 resources ranked by efficiency
Notes: Gemini can find and link to specific free tutorials, YouTube videos, and courses in real-time. The resource recommendations will be current and available, not outdated links.

Why:...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Create an accelerated learning plan.

Skill: [WHAT]
Why: [REASON]
Deadline: [WHEN]
Level: [beginner / basics / intermediate]
Time: [hours available]
Style: [reading / video / hands-on]

Build:
1. 80/20 knowledge map
2. What to skip
3. Daily plan with resources and exercises
4. Project milestone with weekly goals
5. Sticking points and solutions
6. Top 5 resources ranked
Notes: Copilot can create a structured learning tracker in Excel or a Planner board with daily tasks. Ask it to set up a OneNote notebook organized by week with embedded resource links.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the Learning Accelerator for New Skills prompt do?

Create a compressed learning plan for any business skill — from financial modeling to public speaking to a new software tool. Maps the 20% of knowledge that delivers 80% of results, with daily practice tasks and progress checkpoints.

Which AI models is this prompt tested on?

This prompt is field-tested on Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Each model has its own optimized variant above.

Do I need a paid AI account to use this prompt?

No. This prompt is written to run on the free tier of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Paid tiers simply give you longer context windows and faster responses.

Can I customize this prompt for my business?

Yes. Any text inside square brackets is a placeholder you replace with your own business details, such as company name, audience, product or tone. You can also ask the AI to adjust format, length or style after the first output.

When was this prompt last verified?

Each model variant above shows its own freshness stamp. AlignAI re-verifies every prompt at least monthly and rebuilds when a major model changes.
